step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Bergapten is a furocoumarin derivative, structurally similar to psoralen. Multiple references confirm that psoralen-based photochemotherapies (e.g., PUVA) produce phototoxic effects. Specifically, one reference notes "adverse effects include phototoxic effect" directly associated with psoralen photochemotherapy. Since bergapten shares structural properties with psoralen and is classified within the same class of compounds (furocoumarins), it logically follows that bergapten would exhibit comparable phototoxic behavior. Therefore, bergapten causes phototoxicity.
raw_response:
\boxed{A} Bergapten is a furocoumarin derivative, structurally similar to psoralen. Multiple references confirm that psoralen-based photochemotherapies (e.g., PUVA) produce phototoxic effects. Specifically, one reference notes "adverse effects include phototoxic effect" directly associated with psoralen photochemotherapy. Since bergapten shares structural properties with psoralen and is classified within the same class of compounds (furocoumarins), it logically follows that bergapten would exhibit comparable phototoxic behavior. Therefore, bergapten causes phototoxicity.
\boxed{A}
